REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT EAST WEST BANK'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF STATES THAT THE QUESTION OF DUTY ON A NEGLIGENCE CAUSE OF ACTION IS A LEGAL ONE FOR THE COURT, BUT ITS OPPOSITION SUGGESTS NO DUTY EAST WEST BANK COULD HAVE TO IT. PLAINTIFF SAYS ITS "COMMON COUNTS" CLAIM IS "BASED ON" ITS NEGLIGENCE CLAIM (OPP. 5:11-6:6), SO IT TOO FAILS. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR., CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (D501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-20-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT EAST WEST BANK's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. Plaintiff states that the question of duty on a negligence cause of action is a legal one for the Court, but its opposition suggests no duty East West Bank could have to it. Plaintiff says its "common counts" claim is "based on" its negligence claim (Opp. 5:11-6:6), so it too fails. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
